data.title: Costa Rican cassava, a natural and versatile food, is now available in Europe. Discover its story and recipes on www.procomer.com/yuca.
data.description: Cassava from Costa Rica has made its way to Europe as a versatile and natural food option. Learn more about recipes, tips, and the background of this nutritious ingredient at www.procomer.com/yuca. Hailing from the green landscapes of Costa Rica, cassava is gaining global recognition. This development was announced from San Jose, Costa Rica on December 4, 2025. Explore the story behind this unique food item.

data.title: Dow Jones drops 427 points, Apple, Broadcom, Nvidia, and Shopify stocks among big movers. Credo, MongoDB soar late.
data.description: On Monday, Dow Jones Futures saw significant activity with Apple, Broadcom, Nvidia, and Shopify stocks experiencing notable movements. During this time, the Dow Jones industrial average recorded a decline of 427 points. Additionally, Credo and MongoDB witnessed an uptick in late trading. This information was highlighted in recent reports without explicitly referencing the source.

data.title: Cymat receives $1.8M order of underbelly kits for Asian military. SmartMetal™ division granted the production order.
data.description: In Mississauga, ON on December 3, 2025, Cymat Technologies Ltd. disclosed that its division SmartMetal™ secured a new order for stabilized aluminum foam underbelly kits. The company, listed as CYM on TSXV and CYMHF on OTCQB, is thrilled to receive this serial production order for an undisclosed quantity. This development underscores the continued success and demand for Cymat’s innovative SmartMetal™ technology.

data.title: NovaBridge will present new data on ragistomig at ESMO-IO with Abstract #688 by co-developer ABL Bio on Dec 10th at 5:30 PM.
data.description: NovaBridge Biosciences (Nasdaq: NBP), a biotechnology platform company, announced new data from the expanded Phase 1 dosing study of ragistomig, a 4-1BB X PD-L1 bispecific antibody. The data will be presented at the ESMO-IO 2025 by ABL Bio. Poster (Abstract #688) to be presented by Gerald Falchook, MD, Director of Sarah Cannon Research Institute at HealthONE Denver, on December 10th at 5:30 PM GMT.

data.title: Cognite relocates HQ to Arizona, marking growth milestone and commitment to US with grand opening.
data.description: Cognite, a top Industrial AI company, has recently opened its new global headquarters in Tempe, Arizona, signaling a significant move from Oslo, Norway. This shift emphasizes the company's dedication to the North American market and growth strategy. The CEO expressed enthusiasm about the relocation, stating that positioning Cognite in Arizona will place them at the heart of American innovation and manufacturing.
Australia’s stock market rose slightly, supported by miners hitting new all-time highs.
